title: Squirrel Removal Park Slope Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Park Slope, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving brownstones & historic homes. Call (NYC) for fast service!
intro: Park Slope residents know that squirrels are a common sight in Prospect Park, but when these acrobatic rodents invade your brownstone attic or historic home, they can cause serious damage. Our squirrel removal services in Park Slope provide humane, effective solutions tailored to the neighborhood's unique architecture and wildlife challenges. From chewed wiring to contaminated insulation, we handle every aspect of squirrel infestations with expertise and care.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Park Slope's distinctive housing stock, from century-old brownstones to pre-war apartment buildings, with proven techniques that protect your property's architectural integrity. Our licensed technicians average 2-hour response times in the 11215 and 11217 zip codes and offer warranties on all exclusion work.
localContext: Park Slope's tree-lined streets and proximity to Prospect Park create an ideal habitat for gray squirrels, which frequently seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and roof soffits of the area's historic buildings. The neighborhood's limestone and brick facades provide numerous entry points that require specialized sealing techniques to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Park Slope homes?
faqs.answer: Park Slope's abundance of mature trees, proximity to Prospect Park, and older architecture create perfect conditions for squirrels. The neighborhood's brownstones and historic homes often have small gaps in soffits, roof edges, and chimneys that squirrels exploit for nesting, especially during fall and spring breeding seasons.

faqs.question: What does the $900-$2,500 squirrel removal cost include?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on infestation severity, entry point locations, and necessary repairs. Basic removal with 1-2 entry points starts around $900, while extensive cases involving multiple access points, attic cleanup, insulation replacement, and chimney cap installation can reach $2,500. All services include humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and a warranty.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to squirrel problems in Park Slope?
faqs.answer: We typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency calls in Park Slope and can schedule same-day or next-day appointments for non-emergency situations. Our Brooklyn-based team is familiar with the 11215 and 11217 areas and can quickly navigate the neighborhood to address your squirrel issue promptly.

faqs.question: Will squirrel removal damage my historic Park Slope brownstone?
faqs.answer: Absolutely not. We specialize in working with Park Slope's historic architecture and use preservation-conscious methods to seal entry points without compromising your building's appearance or integrity. Our exclusion materials are carefully color-matched and installed to maintain your home's aesthetic while permanently preventing squirrel re-entry.
